description: The SACRED 12-section Trevor Otts Hero funnel contract that prove_sf_copy.py loads and enforces against a funnel COPY ledger (per-page sections emitted by the Signature Funnel copywriter). Every rule here is fail-closed: a violation is sys.exit(2) with the named AF-FUN-* code — a violating page is NOT run, NOT rendered, NOT built. Section names + every char/word band are reproduced VERBATIM from SOURCE-FRAMEWORK.md (the 12-section IP) and IMPROVED-FRAMEWORK-v2.md Part 5 (Thank-You bands). Never floored, reordered, or reinterpreted. The prover measures STRIPPED text and IGNORES any self-reported count field.

1.name: The Big Bold Claim
1.rule: 180-225 chars. Must include the product title. Must carry a labeled CTA. The single most important section.

2.name: The Big Bold Pain 1
2.rule: 180-225 chars. 2nd person. NO question format. Labeled CTA. Circumstantial pain (Pain Ladder rung 1).

3.name: The Big Bold Pain 2
3.rule: 180-225 chars. 2nd person. NO question format. Labeled CTA. Private pain (Pain Ladder rung 2).

4.name: The Big Bold Pain 3
4.rule: 180-225 chars. 2nd person. NO question format. Labeled CTA. Witnessed pain (Pain Ladder rung 3).

5.name: The Big Bold Why
5.rule: <=30 words. Starts 'That's the reason why...'. Ends with a motivational CTA.

6.name: The Big Bold Who
6.rule: <=30 words. 3-6 personas, each with what they seek. NO CTA button and NO CTA in this section.

7.name: The Big Bold What
7.rule: 70-120 words. 5-10 specific bullets, each naming exactly what the buyer gets.

8.name: The Big Bold Benefit 1
8.rule: <=30 words. Felt benefit (this week). NO CTA button.

9.name: The Big Bold Benefit 2
9.rule: <=30 words. Measured benefit (this quarter). NO CTA button.

10.name: The Big Bold Benefit 3
10.rule: <=30 words. Become benefit (this life). Carries the inspirational CTA button (peak-end).

11.name: The Big How To
11.rule: 100-150 words. NO CTA button. 5-10 steps (ideal 7). Steps 1-6 each 89-116 chars; step 7 <=170 chars. MUST include a share-with-a-friend, a check-email-for-a-bonus, a founder-personal-text, and a join-the-community step. The final step is the in-copy motivational CTA.

12.name: The Big Bold Heartfelt Message
12.part2_lead: i used to be just like you
12.rule: 100-150 words. 6 labeled parts. Part 2 (The Big Struggle) starts 'I used to be just like you...'.

upsell.display_name: 7 Reasons To Commit To Your ____ Future
upsell.rule: Upsell (OTO1) replaces Section 12 with '7 Reasons To Commit To Your ____ Future' renumbered to Section 8; exactly 7 numbered reasons; CTA in every section; true scarcity only.

downsell.rule: Downsell replaces Section 12 with 'When Time Runs Out' renumbered to Section 8; exactly 7 things they'll miss; CTA in every section.

upsell-2.display_name: 7 Reasons To Commit To Your ____ Future
upsell-2.rule: OTO2 replaces Section 12 with '7 Reasons To Commit To Your ____ Future' (blank-fill MUST differ from OTO1); exactly 7 numbered reasons; categorically different offer.

downsell-2.rule: Downsell-2 replaces Section 12 with 'When Time Runs Out' (final-door misses) renumbered to Section 8; exactly 7 things they'll miss; the smallest true yes; after this the funnel never pitches again.

TY-1.name: The Big Bold Welcome
TY-1.rule: 120-180 chars. Celebrate the decision + name the product title. Second person, celebratory, zero selling.

TY-2.name: What Happens Next
TY-2.rule: 4-6 numbered steps, each 89-116 chars (Section 11 step discipline). Momentum-ordered; every step starts with a verb and names its payoff.

TY-3.name: The Big Empowering Close
TY-3.rule: <=170 chars (Section 11 step-7 cap). Destiny register, signed by the founder. NO offer CTA.

main.rule: The full 12-section hero. Every section name + band SACRED.

upsell.rule: OTO1: Sections 1-7 (same names/bands) + replacement Section 8. Sections 8-11 (benefits/how-to) and the founder letter (Section 12) are EXCLUDED; the replacement occupies Section 8.

downsell.rule: OTO1-decline: Sections 1-7 + replacement Section 8 ('When Time Runs Out').

upsell-2.rule: OTO2: Sections 1-7 + replacement Section 8 ('7 Reasons...', different blank-fill from OTO1).

downsell-2.rule: OTO2-decline: Sections 1-7 + replacement Section 8 ('When Time Runs Out', final-door).

thank-you.rule: TY-1/TY-2/TY-3. NO offer CTAs anywhere; utility buttons only. Enforced by prove_sf_no_pitch.py.

checkout.rule: 7-step only: dedicated signature-styled order page, minimal microcopy; no 12-section gate.

funnel_matrix.rule: Configurable step count chosen at intake (Q10). Every path terminates at Thank-You; after Downsell-2 the funnel never pitches again.

autofail_codes.AF-FUN-PROFILE-UNKNOWN: a page carries a page_type not in the profiles map
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SECTION-MISSING: a required section for the page profile is absent
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SECTION-EXTRA: a page carries a section not allowed by its profile
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SECTION-ORDER: sections are not contiguous/in order for the profile
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC1-TITLE: Section 1 does not contain the product title
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-PAIN-CHARBAND: a pain section (2/3/4) outside 180-225 stripped chars
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-PAIN-QUESTION: a pain section (2/3/4) is written in question format
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-PAIN-2ND-PERSON: a pain section (2/3/4) is not written in 2nd person (no you/your)
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-PAIN-CTA: a pain section (2/3/4) missing a labeled CTA
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC5-LEAD: Section 5 does not start 'That's the reason why...'
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-BENEFIT-NO-CTA: a benefit section (8/9) carries a CTA (forbidden)
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC10-CTA: Section 10 missing its inspirational CTA button
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC11-NO-CTA-BUTTON: Section 11 carries a CTA button (forbidden; step 7 is the in-copy CTA)
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC11-STEPBAND: a Section 11 step 1-6 outside 89-116 stripped chars
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC12-PARTS: Section 12 does not carry 6 labeled parts
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC12-STRUGGLE: Section 12 part 2 does not start 'I used to be just like you...'
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC8REPL-NAME: the replacement Section 8 name does not match the page profile
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-SEC8REPL-COUNT: the replacement Section 8 does not carry exactly 7 items
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-TY1-TITLE: Thank-You TY-1 does not name the product title
autofail_codes.AF-FUN-TY2-STEPBAND: a Thank-You TY-2 step outside 89-116 stripped chars
